empty.title: Start your first learning plan
empty.description: Tell Miniverto what you want to learn and where you are now. It will turn your vague ideas into a clear, actionable plan.

materials.title: Learning Materials
materials.privacyNote: Original files stay local by default. Miniverto uses summaries or excerpts from selected materials when planning.
materials.emptyDescription: Upload slides, notes, PDFs, PPTs, or recordings while creating a plan. They will appear here as context for future planning and replanning.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsSub: Task due dates and learning reminders
settings.llmNote: API keys are securely stored in the system keychain
settings.modelRecommendation: Recommendation: use stronger reasoning and structured-output models for complex plans. Free models are good for trials and lightweight plans; OpenRelay depends on the user's own local quotas.
settings.searchEnabledSub: Miniverto searches for latest resources when generating plans
settings.clearCacheSub: Clear Miniverto generation cache and temp data

diag.resetOnboardingSub: Show the initial setup wizard again

steps.goalHint: Start with choices, then add your real goal in plain text
steps.profileHint: Miniverto uses your level, time, and intensity to pace the plan
steps.methodsHint: Choose learning methods and attach slides, notes, or recordings
steps.reviewHint: Confirm the method bundle and the strongest model for planning
steps.generatingHint: Miniverto is building your personalized learning plan…

goal.title: What kind of learning goal is this?

materials.uploadCta: Choose slides, notes, PDFs, PPTs, or recordings
materials.pastePlaceholder: Paste syllabus, notes, requirements, or key chapters…

create.whatToLearn: What do you want to learn?
create.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. I want to learn Rust, coming from a Python background, interested in systems programming. I have some coding experience but no memory management…
create.deadlinePlaceholder: e.g. 6 weeks / August exam / no hard deadline
create.extraNotesPlaceholder: Anything else for Miniverto? Weak spots, course requirements, or learning styles to avoid…
create.analyzingHint: Thinking about how best to help you

clarify.q1: How much do you already know about this topic?
clarify.q1Why: 💡 Helps Miniverto calibrate the starting point
clarify.q1Placeholder: e.g. Complete beginner / watched some tutorials / used at work but not systematically…
clarify.q2: How much time can you invest daily/weekly?
clarify.q2Why: 💡 Properly pace tasks to match your available time
clarify.q2Placeholder: e.g. 1 hour daily, 3-4 hours on weekends…
clarify.q3: What do you expect to be able to do after learning?
clarify.q3Why: 💡 Define a verifiable end state for assessment
clarify.q3Placeholder: e.g. Complete a small project independently / pass a certification / read related papers…
clarify.q4: Any preferred learning methods or resource types?
clarify.q4Why: 💡 Match your learning style for better recommendations
clarify.q4Placeholder: e.g. Prefer videos / like books / hands-on focused / prefer native language materials…

create.doneMessage: Plan generated. Miniverto plan quality score: 8.5/10. Start with Milestone 1.

replan.title: Replan
replan.inputHint: Miniverto will regenerate your plan based on current progress and feedback
replan.loadingHint: Miniverto is analyzing progress data and generating a new plan…
replan.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. Progress is 30% slower than expected, want to compress the first two milestones…
replan.loadingTitle: Miniverto is rearranging based on progress…
replan.loadingDetail: Analyzing completed tasks, matching new pace, generating change suggestions
replan.atomicNote: Changes are applied atomically — all succeed or all roll back, no partial state.

cmd.placeholder: Search projects, tasks, or run actions…

welcome.title: Welcome to miniverto
welcome.subtitle: Turn vague learning desires into executable, measurable, iterative plans.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings

theme.title: Choose your look
theme.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings

privacy.title: How your data flows
privacy.subtitle: Learn how miniverto handles your data
privacy.agree: I understand how miniverto handles data and agree to continue
privacy.local: All data is 100% stored locally — miniverto has no servers
privacy.keychain: API keys are stored in the system keychain, never in logs or databases
privacy.noMeta: Only your learning content is sent to LLMs — no private metadata

llm.title: Connect a model provider
llm.subtitle: Choose an LLM provider and enter your API key
llm.keyNote: Keys are stored in the system keychain — miniverto cannot read plaintext

search.title: Search Enhancement (optional)
search.subtitle: Enable Miniverto to verify resource links and find latest content
search.note: Works fine without this. You can enable it later in settings.

example.title: Start with an example?
example.subtitle: Pick a sample project to explore the plan structure — delete anytime
